tasks.name: Create DashboardEmptyState component skeleton
tasks.purpose: Establish base component structure that wraps @kit/ui/empty-state with dashboard-specific variant logic

constraints: Must accept 'type' prop for variant selection
Must support all 5 variants: presentations, course, submissions, surveys, generic
Must allow optional prop overrides for heading/description/cta

tasks.input_state: Base EmptyState component exists in @kit/ui. No dashboard-specific variant exists.
tasks.output_state: DashboardEmptyState.tsx file exists with component skeleton, TypeScript interface for props (type, optional overrides), and placeholder for config mapping logic.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/dashboard-empty-state.tsx exists with DashboardEmptyStateProps interface defining type and optional overrides, component renders EmptyState wrapper

tasks.name: Add variant configuration mapping

action.target: Config object mapping variant types to icon/heading/description/cta

tasks.purpose: Define the static configuration that maps each empty state type to its specific content and appearance

dependencies: lucide-react icons (FileText, BookOpen, ClipboardList, MessagesSquare, Inbox)
constraints: Each variant must have: icon (LucideIcon), headingKey (i18n), descriptionKey (i18n), ctaKey (i18n), ctaHref (string)
Use presentation icon for presentations, book for course, clipboard for submissions, messages for surveys, inbox for generic
CTA hrefs should navigate to logical create/start pages

tasks.input_state: DashboardEmptyState component skeleton exists with props interface
tasks.output_state: Component file contains EMPTY_STATE_CONFIG const object with all 5 variant configurations, each defining icon, i18n keys, and navigation href
tasks.acceptance_criterion: EMPTY_STATE_CONFIG object exists with 5 keys (presentations, course, submissions, surveys, generic), each with icon, headingKey, descriptionKey, ctaKey, ctaHref properties

tasks.name: Implement variant selection logic

action.target: Type prop logic to select and render variant configuration

tasks.purpose: Connect the type prop to the config map and render the appropriate empty state content with icon, text, and CTA button

dependencies: Link from next/link for CTA navigation
constraints: Must select config based on type prop
Must render icon before heading
Must use Trans component for all text (heading, description, CTA)
Must wrap CTA button in Link with asChild pattern
Must allow prop overrides to replace config defaults

tasks.input_state: Component skeleton and config mapping both exist but not wired together
tasks.output_state: Component renders selected variant config, displaying icon, translated heading/description, and CTA button that navigates to correct page. Optional overrides replace config values.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component returns EmptyState with icon, EmptyStateHeading, EmptyStateText, and EmptyStateButton wrapped in Link using config values from EMPTY_STATE_CONFIG[type], with optional prop overrides applied

tasks.name: Add i18n translation keys

action.target: Translation keys for all empty state variants

tasks.purpose: Provide internationalized text for all 5 empty state variants (heading, description, CTA) in common namespace

constraints: Add under 'emptyStates' key in common namespace
Each variant needs: heading, description, cta
Follow existing translation key naming conventions
Text should be helpful, positive, and actionable per research guidelines

tasks.input_state: common.json exists with standard translations but no emptyStates section
tasks.output_state: common.json contains 'emptyStates' object with 5 variants (presentations, course, submissions, surveys, generic), each with heading/description/cta keys and English text
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File apps/web/public/locales/en/common.json contains emptyStates.presentations.heading, emptyStates.presentations.description, emptyStates.presentations.cta, and equivalent keys for course, submissions, surveys, generic
tasks.verification_command: jq -e '.emptyStates.presentations.heading and .emptyStates.course.heading and .emptyStates.submissions.heading and .emptyStates.surveys.heading and .emptyStates.generic.heading' apps/web/public/locales/en/common.json

tasks.name: Add component unit tests
tasks.purpose: Verify all 5 variants render correctly with proper icons, text, and CTA buttons, and that optional overrides work

dependencies: Mock Trans component to avoid i18n setup
constraints: Test all 5 variant types render correct content
Test optional overrides replace config defaults
Test icons render for each variant
Test CTA buttons have correct href
Follow existing test patterns in codebase

tasks.input_state: DashboardEmptyState component is fully implemented and i18n keys exist
tasks.output_state: Test file exists with passing tests covering: each variant renders, icons are correct, CTA hrefs are correct, optional overrides work
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/__tests__/dashboard-empty-state.test.tsx exists with tests for all 5 variants plus override behavior, all tests pass via pnpm test:unit
